role_title: Senior Associate, Dasher & Logistics Strategy & Operations

level_signals: 3-5 years of experience in consulting, strategy, financial services, operations, technology, startups or related experience
Reports directly into a Manager or Senior Manager
Base range $87K-$128K consistent with mid-senior individual contributor at DoorDash

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 3-5 years of experience in consulting, strategy, financial services, operations, technology, startups or related experience
You are able to analyze and synthesize data, make informed decisions and balance quantitative measurement with an empathetic, intuition-based mindset. You can crunch data in SQL/excel independently.
You love thinking about problems from a first principles approach, and you aren't afraid to take action and try new things in order to create the future.
You are able to communicate complex topics in a clear, concise, and thorough way to stakeholders at all levels of the organization.
You focus on getting stuff done and aren't afraid to get into the details. No job is beneath you and you lead from the front and with optimism.
You're comfortable with ambiguity and the dynamic nature of operations which may require working weekends and holidays
You have a Bachelor's degree in a related field

scope.surface: Dasher & Logistics Live Operations — Dasher supply & hours improvement
core_responsibilities: Build analysis to create data-driven decisions to improve the experience for our Users
Operate at the lowest level of detail to become an expert of this problem space
Learn how to develop strategies and act on them
Work closely with cross-functional teams to drive impact for DoorDash
Focus on opportunities to improve Dasher supply & hours by getting into the weeds and really understanding what's happening on the ground, developing and testing hypotheses, and scaling that impact

green_flags: Clear reporting structure disclosed (Manager or Senior Manager)
Concrete team mandate and metrics listed (delivery times, cost per order, dasher compensation)
Broad background accepted (consulting, financial services, startups, operations, technology)
Comprehensive benefits package described in detail
Expected fill date disclosed (7/11/26), indicating active and time-bounded search
red_flags: Work location type is unclear — JD does not specify remote, hybrid, or onsite; cities not listed for this role
Role may require working weekends and holidays per the JD

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years range, reporting structure, and comp band)
scope.business_model (inferred from company description and product context)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from team mandate description, not listed as explicit role metrics)
ambiguities: Work location not specified in JD body — no city, no remote/hybrid/onsite designation. The compensation section references localized pay and mentions Illinois and Colorado as part of the national range, but no specific cities are named for this role.
The 3-5 year experience requirement is stated as a range rather than a hard minimum; treated as hard given unconditional bullet placement in 'We're excited about you because' section.
